name: Tuliprox
short_desc: Powerful IPTV proxy and M3U/Xtream playlist processor
author: euzu
description: Tuliprox is a powerful self-hosted IPTV proxy and playlist processor. It supports Xtream Codes API and M3U playlist sources, provides reverse proxy streaming, advanced filtering and mapping with a custom DSL, TMDB/PTT metadata enrichment, zero-downtime config reloads, and an embedded web UI. No external database required — all storage uses embedded B+Tree databases.
